title: XRP Unleashed
original_title: Rigged from the Start, Exposing the SEC's war on crypto
overview: Rigged from the Start, Exposing the SEC war on Crypto (previously XRP Unleashed) pulls back the curtain on the high-stakes legal battle between the SEC and Ripple Labs, exploring the impact on the crypto world through the passionate perspective of the XRP Army. With exclusive insights from industry leaders, attorneys, crypto influencers and researchers this documentary reveals the untold story behind one of the most significant cases in finance, challenging the boundaries of regulation and the future of the global monetary system.
